title: Oil Revenues on Accrual Basis, Iran, 1955/56-1962/63 (World Bank, 1960)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION, not bulk download. Original document is a 1960 scanned World Bank report (data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf) with a poor-quality OCR text layer (garbled digits in places). Every value in this file was verified by rendering the exact source page (Table 1, page 36) to a high-resolution PNG (pdftoppm -r 200, and a further 400 dpi crop for the ambiguous 1955/56 row) and visually reading the table directly from the image, cross-checked against the raw pdftotext extraction to catch transcription slips. The raw OCR text for this page was almost entirely garbled and was not usable except as a rough guide. No value was interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
time_coverage: 1955/56-1962/63 (solar years ending March 20; 1955/56 and 1962/63 are 6-month periods)
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
notes: Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf — Table 1, page 36. Table shows oil revenues allocated among the Budget, NIOC (National Iranian Oil Company), P.O. (Plan Organization) and B.P.C. (presumably a Bank Melli/petroleum-related development fund abbreviation as printed; not spelled out in the source). 1955/56-1958/59 rows are 'Actuals'; 1959/60-1962/63 rows are Plan Organization estimates based on the Government's statement to the Bank of March 16, 1959, assuming an 8% p.a. increase after 1959/60. For the 1955/56 row, the source image shows an extra stray dash mark ('----') printed in the gap between the NIOC and P.O. columns that does not correspond to any of the table's four allocation columns and has no counterpart in any other row; it was treated as a typographical/print artifact and omitted, since the remaining four values (Budget=nil, NIOC=24.5, P.O.=23.5, B.P.C.=nil) sum exactly to the printed Total of 48.0, confirming the reading. All other cells were unambiguous. Part of a systematic effort to extract Pahlavi-era (esp. 1941-1960) data from primary-source PDFs already in data/raw/.
